transcriptLoadError: The transcript is no longer available. Try processing the video again.

uploadFileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum allowed size is {size} MB.
uploadDurationUnreadable: Could not read the video duration. Try another file.
uploadDurationTooLong: Video too long. Maximum duration is {duration}.
liveOutputSubtitle: Select any subtitle on the video to correct it in place.
noRunsYet: No runs yet — upload a video to get started.
accountSettingsSubtitle: Update your name and password. Email is fixed to your login provider.
cookieText: We use cookies to keep the app fast and improve your experience
resultPreviewDescription: Generate a video to see the preview and export options here
registerSubtitle: Create your account and start in seconds.
exportDataDescription: Download a copy of your personal data.
deleteAccountDescription: Deleting your account is permanent. All your data will be lost.
deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
historySubtitle: View and manage your processed videos.
historyExpiry: Original uploads are removed after 24 hours
processingGateAuthDescription: Your video and settings will stay exactly as they are.
processingGateUseLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
processingGateCostDescription: Review the cost before processing starts.
processingGateInsufficient: You need {count} more credits to continue.
processingGateChargeNote: Credits are reserved before the file is sent to an external provider. They are returned automatically if processing fails earlier; starting does not charge your card again.
videoCreditPricingPending: Until duration is available, we reserve the safe maximum.
viralGenerateTooltip: Analyze your video to generate attention-grabbing hooks, captions, and hashtags.
tooltipPositionDesc: Move the complete subtitle block from the safe bottom to the safe top edge.
tooltipSizeDesc: Make subtitles bigger/smaller. Aim for readable without covering faces.
tooltipMaxLinesDesc: Limits how many lines appear at once. Fewer lines = cleaner; more lines = more context.
tooltipColorDesc: Pick a high-contrast color. Yellow works well on most videos.
tooltipKaraokeDesc: Highlights the word being spoken for a more dynamic karaoke feel.
previewWindowDesc: Check how your subtitles fit on a mobile screen.
previewVideoToggle: Preview video, tap to toggle play
factCheckTooltip: Verify the accuracy of claims in your video to ensure maximum credibility.
viralGenerateDesc: Generate optimized title, description, and hashtags.
allVerified: All claims verified — no factual errors detected!
watermarkDesc: Burn the Ascentia branding into the final video export.
newVideoModalDesc: This closes the current editing view. Your completed video will remain in History until you delete it.
privacyPageIntro: This policy explains in plain language which data Subframe needs to create transcripts, captions, and export files.
privacyCollectionBody: We process the video you select, its audio, generated captions, and export settings. If you create an account, we also store basic profile details and the status of your jobs.
privacyRetentionBody: Original upload files are configured for removal after 24 hours. Generated files and job records may remain in History until you delete them or the system retention policy is applied.
privacyProvidersBody: For transcription, audio may be sent to the service's active provider, currently ElevenLabs Scribe v2. Optional Intelligence features may use a separate AI provider only when you choose to run them.
privacyChoicesBody: From account settings, you can export your personal data, delete individual jobs, or permanently delete your account.
privacyCookiesBody: We use strictly necessary cookies and browser storage for sign-in, language, cookie consent, and continuity of your current work.
privacyContactBody: For questions or requests about your data, contact Ascentia through its official website.
termsPageIntro: These terms explain the basic rules for using Subframe. By using the service, you agree to use it lawfully and responsibly.
termsAcceptanceBody: If you do not agree to these terms, do not upload content or use the service's processing features.
termsServiceBody: Subframe provides transcription, caption creation, preview, and video export tools. Features and availability may evolve as the product improves.
termsContentBody: You retain ownership of your content. You are responsible for having the necessary rights to every video, audio track, image, or text that you upload.
termsAccuracyBody: Transcripts, captions, and Intelligence results may contain errors. Review them before publication or use in decisions with significant consequences.
termsAvailabilityBody: We may need to limit or temporarily interrupt features for maintenance, security, or changes to external providers.
termsLiabilityBody: The service is provided in its currently available form, without a guarantee that every result will be error-free or suitable for every purpose.
creditPurchaseDescription: Prepaid balance for secure video processing, with no subscription or automatic renewal.
creditPurchaseLoadError: The credit packages could not be loaded.
creditPurchaseUnsafeRedirect: The payment page failed the security check.
creditPurchaseError: The payment could not be started.
creditPurchaseDebtNotice: There is a {count}-credit reversal. Your next purchase will cover this amount first.
creditPurchaseNotEnabled: Online payments are not enabled yet. We will complete the Stripe setup together before they go live.
creditPurchaseStripeNote: Secure payment on Stripe's hosted checkout page.
creditPurchaseCancelled: Purchase cancelled — you were not charged.
creditPurchaseSuccess: {count} credits were added to your balance.
creditPurchasePending: Payment is being confirmed. Credits will appear automatically.
creditPurchaseStatusError: The payment could not be confirmed.
